subject: Re: Air Ghislaine, N908GM
body:
that control as it is samll can be put in the side of the armest,, not thee top


----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, March 14, 2007 7:58:46 AM
Subject: Air Ghislaine, N908GM




Please advise on the console and phone controls..

Larry,
 
Thanks for getting back to me. the answers are in blue below:
 
Regards,
 
Carmen
 
 

JE wants to make sure the console is no wider that 10" from outside to outside. The console has not been engineered yet. At this concept phase, it is approximately 8" wide 
He is wondering what the controls on the console are for. He may want to 
redesign the console so the whole thing is covered; but wants to know what the 
controls are for first. The controls are what he asked for at the NY meeting. They control which of the headsets of the aft bench passengers may participate in the cell phone conversation which he initiates through the console cell phone connection.
He wants it to be all leather on the forward interior wall, no wood.. so both 
walls should be white.All leather on the forward bulkhead-- We can upholster it with leather. No Problem.
thx,
Sarah
